text: “Revocation of driver’s license” means the termination by formal action of the Department of a person’s license to drive a motor vehicle.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484C
##### § 484C.090 — “Revocation of driver’s license” defined.

“Revocation of driver’s license” means the termination by formal action of the Department of a person’s license to drive a motor vehicle.

subsections.text: “Revocation of driver’s license” means the termination by formal action of the Department of a person’s license to drive a motor vehicle.
